results.rendered_html:
anusāraka, -sārin a.
1 Following, pursuing, going after, attendant on; tāmabhyagacchadruditānusārī  R. 14. 70 ; mṛgānusāriṇaṃ pinākinaṃ  Ś. 1. 6. ; parimalaḥ pavanānusārī  Dk. 91 ; kṛpaṇānusāri ca dhanaṃ  Pt. 1. 278  going after, falling to the lot of.
2 According or conformable to, following; yathāśāstra˚  Ms. 7. 31. 
3 Seeking, looking out for, investigating, scrutinizing;  Ms. 7. 102.
